business.geography_hint: Paris, France; remote (French market, CPF/OPCO funding)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Sells a person's defined expertise (AI consulting, training, audits, keynotes) — the visitor is deciding whether to trust the individual, evidenced by credentials, service framing, and process/funding reassurance.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to submit the contact form (request a quote / discuss a training project) or start the free AI audit

structure.archetype_note: Consultant multi-page: home value-prop + service/formation catalogs + SEO-oriented sectors/cities/tools pages, converging on one contact form.

mapped.observed_as: Why choose me as your AI partner
5 services to embed AI in your company
CPF, OPCO, plan formation : on s'occupe de tout
#7 World CEO of the Year 2024 (ceoranking.com) badge

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; clear consultant trust archetype with single form conversion, service/training catalogs, bilingual FR/EN.

gap_findings: Formation cards carry duration/level metadata (1-5 day, beginner/advanced) — closer to a structured course-list than the generic 'packages' price grid, but no prices shown; still expressible.
Site is SEO-forward with Secteurs/Villes/Outils landing pages (programmatic local/vertical SEO pages) — multipage covers structure but not the SEO-fan-out intent.
